pvvoicechanger.tab.enable.desc: Sends your processed microphone to other Plasmo Voice listeners.
pvvoicechanger.tab.preset.desc: Switches between the built-in live voice styles.
pvvoicechanger.tab.toggle_bind.desc: Key used to enable or disable the voice changer.
pvvoicechanger.studio.title: Voice Changer Studio
pvvoicechanger.studio.subtitle: Shape your outgoing voice, preview it here, then save it as a profile file.
pvvoicechanger.studio.open_mic_test.desc: Uses the built-in Plasmo Voice microphone preview to avoid source conflicts.
pvvoicechanger.studio.delete_saved.desc: Deletes the currently selected saved preset file.
pvvoicechanger.studio.hint: Use the preset icons first, then shape EQ and texture if the voice still needs work.
pvvoicechanger.slider.strength.desc: Global intensity of the current voice profile.
pvvoicechanger.slider.mix.desc: How much processed voice is mixed into the original mic signal.
pvvoicechanger.slider.gain.desc: Output loudness after the voice changer chain.
pvvoicechanger.slider.pitch.desc: Moves the perceived voice height up or down.
pvvoicechanger.slider.formant.desc: Changes vocal character without behaving exactly like pitch.
pvvoicechanger.slider.low_eq.desc: Bass amount. Raise for fuller voices, lower for radio or child voices.
pvvoicechanger.slider.mid_eq.desc: Body and intelligibility of the voice. Useful for radio-style presence.
pvvoicechanger.slider.high_eq.desc: Brightness and air. Too much can make the voice sharp or harsh.
pvvoicechanger.slider.distortion.desc: Adds grit and saturation. Use lightly unless you want monster tones.
pvvoicechanger.slider.noise.desc: Adds hiss texture. Best for radio, almost always low for normal voices.
pvvoicechanger.slider.robot_mix.desc: Metallic modulation layer for robotic or synthetic voices.
pvvoicechanger.slider.robot_frequency.de: Carrier frequency of the robot layer. Higher is thinner and buzzier.
pvvoicechanger.slider.echo_mix.desc: Amount of cave or room tail blended into the processed voice.
pvvoicechanger.slider.echo_feedback.desc: Length of the tail. Higher values feel larger and more haunted.
pvvoicechanger.slider.tremolo_depth.desc: How strongly the voice volume wobbles over time.
pvvoicechanger.bind.title: Voice Changer Bind
pvvoicechanger.bind.hint: Click the bind button, then press a key or mouse button.
